dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
members, trainers, and front desk staff
What should users be able to do?
sign up, book classes, and renew subscriptions
Do users need login or authentication?
booking a class should be instant basically
payment and member data should be safe

functional: The system shall allow members to create and access accounts.
The system shall allow members to sign up for gym memberships.
The system shall allow members to book classes.
The system shall allow members to renew subscriptions.
non_functional: The system shall complete class booking operations quickly.
The system shall protect payment information and member data.
